EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX
Assembly
ESRI.Server.CartoX.dll

Provides access to properties defining an annotation feature class to be created.

[Guid("D7881990-61B9-4F6A-885C-27F95913DB7F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICreateAnnotationFeatureClassDefinitionBridge

Properties

AllowSymbolOverrides

Indicates if an annotation may override a symbol property even though it references the symbol collection.

bool AllowSymbolOverrides { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AutoCreate

Indicates if feature-linked annotation is to be automatically created when a feature is created.

bool AutoCreate { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ConfigKeyword

The geodatabase configuration keyword.

string ConfigKeyword { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureClassName

The name of the feature class.

string FeatureClassName { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureDataset

The feature dataset to create the annotation feature class in. If null, the feature class will be standalone.

IFeatureDataset FeatureDataset { set; }

Property Value

IFeatureDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureLinked

Indicates if the feature class is feature-linked.

bool FeatureLinked { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureWorkspace

The workspace to create the annotation feature class in.

IFeatureWorkspace FeatureWorkspace { set; }

Property Value

IFeatureWorkspace

Examples

Sample Snippet

Fields

The fields collection to create the annotation feature class with. If null, default fields will be used.

IFields Fields { set; }

Property Value

IFields

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeneralPlacementPropertiesJSON

The general placement properties of the label engine.

string GeneralPlacementPropertiesJSON { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometryDef

The geometry definition of the feature class.

IGeometryDef GeometryDef { set; }

Property Value

IGeometryDef

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasBigObjectID

Indicates if the feature class should be created with a 64-bit OID.

bool HasBigObjectID { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasGlobalID

Indicates if the feature class should be created with a Global ID.

bool HasGlobalID { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasGlobalIDRelationship

Indicates if the feature-linked annotation relationship class should be created with a Global ID.

bool HasGlobalIDRelationship { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

LabelClassCollectionJSON

The annotation class properties of the annotation feature class expressed as a collection of label classes.

string LabelClassCollectionJSON { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

LinkedFeatureClass

The linked feature class if creating feature-linked annotation.

IFeatureClass LinkedFeatureClass { set; }

Property Value

IFeatureClass

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceScale

The reference scale of the annotation feature class.

double ReferenceScale { set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceScaleUnit

The reference scale unit of the annotation feature class. Only applicable if the feature class has an unknown coordinate system.

IUnit ReferenceScaleUnit { set; }

Property Value

IUnit

Examples

Sample Snippet

RequireSymbolID

Indicates if an annotation must reference a symbol in the symbol collection.

bool RequireSymbolID { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ShapeFieldName

The name of the shape field.

string ShapeFieldName { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SymbolCollectionJSON

The symbol collection of the annotation feature class as a JSON string.

string SymbolCollectionJSON { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

TextStringFieldLength

The length of the text string field.

int TextStringFieldLength { set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

UpdateOnShapeChange

Indicates if an annotation is to be automatically recreated when a feature's shape is changed.

bool UpdateOnShapeChange { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet
